ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_flow_data" (
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flow record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the flow data */,
  "interface_name" TEXT /* Name of the interface where data was collected */,
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the specific point of energy flow */,
  "flow_mwh" REAL /* Energy flow measured in MWh */,
  "positive_limit_mwh" REAL /* Positive energy limit in MWh */,
  "negative_limit_mwh" REAL /* Negative energy limit in MWh */,
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the energy source */,
  "forecasted_flow_mwh" REAL /* Forecasted energy flow in MWh */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_flow_data_interface_name FOREIGN KEY ("interface_name") REFERENCES interfaces ("interface_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_flow_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("point_id") REFERENCES points ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_flow_data_energy_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interfaces" (
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interface */,
  "interface_name" TEXT /* Name of the interface */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the interface */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the interface */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the interface */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interface_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each point */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the point's function or type */,
  "point_type" TEXT /* Type of point (e.g., generation, transmission, distribution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flow record that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., positive limit exceeded, negative limit exceeded) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was triggered */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the alert has been resolved */,
  "alert_configuration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alert configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_alert_configuration_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_configuration_id") REFERENCES alert_configurations ("alert_configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_flow_id FOREIGN KEY ("flow_id") REFERENCES energy_flow_data ("flow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original flow record */,
  "average_flow_mwh" REAL /* Average flow measured in MWh for the period */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the recorded average */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of energy source (e.g., solar, wind, fossil fuel) */,
  "capacity_mwh" REAL /* Total capacity of the energy source in MWh */,
  "carbon_footprint" REAL /* Carbon footprint of the energy source in tons CO2e */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_sources_source_name FOREIGN KEY ("source_name") REFERENCES energy_source_categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_source_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_source_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_source_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES energy_source_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_configurations" (
  "alert_configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert configuration */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., positive limit exceeded, negative limit exceeded) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_configuration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_flow_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flow record */,
  "forecasted_flow_mwh" REAL /* Forecasted energy flow in MWh */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carbon_footprints" (
  "carbon_footprint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each carbon footprint record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the energy source */,
  "carbon_footprint" REAL /* Carbon footprint in tons CO2e */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the carbon footprint record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carbon_footprint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_footprints_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_grid_topology" (
  "topology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topology record */,
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the interface */,
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the point */,
  "connection_type" TEXT /* Type of connection (e.g., transmission line, distribution line) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_grid_topology_interface_id FOREIGN KEY ("interface_id") REFERENCES interfaces ("interface_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_grid_topology_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("point_id") REFERENCES points ("point_id")
)
